Headline: #21 Cermak Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Cermak/Kilbourn
ShortDescription: Eastbound 21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via Cermak, Cicero, 16th, Kostner and Cermak: due to, street blockage near Cermak/Kilbourn.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Eastbound #21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via Cermak, Cicero, 16th, Kostner, Cermak and over regular route, due to street blockage near Cermak/Kilbourn.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
